pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, causing runtime failures or missing features on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce the new baseline.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud dependencies to a version compatible with Spring Boot 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x due to package renames (jakarta.* vs javax.*) and API changes, leading to compilation or runtime errors.
